LanguageData.FB_Devourer.label: devourer
LanguageData.FB_Devourer.description: A tank fleshbeast that swallows non-allied targets and digests them into hemogel.
LanguageData.FB_Devourer.tools.0.label: crushing maw
LanguageData.FB_Devourer.tools.1.label: hooked hide
LanguageData.FB_DevourerChargeFlyer.label: devourer charge
